About Me

Designing with
purpose & passion

I'm Anurag, a UI/UX designer from Mumbai passionate about creating interfaces that are functional and beautiful. My design philosophy is rooted in empathy — understanding users deeply before a single pixel is placed.

My Process

From idea to reality

A structured, empathy-driven design process that ensures every decision is intentional and user-focused.

01

Discovery

Deep research into user needs, business goals and competitive landscape to shape a clear project direction.

02

UX Design

Wireframes, flows and lo-fi prototypes that map the complete user journey before visual design begins.

03

UI Design

High-fidelity mockups with a cohesive visual language — typography, colour and motion in perfect harmony.

04

Delivery

Polished handoff with developer-ready assets, specs and docs for a seamless, frictionless build process.
